# JSON Tools

> Free online JSON, CSV, XML, YAML, and developer tools. No signup, no data sent to servers, 100% client-side.

JSON Tools is a collection of free browser-based developer utilities for working with JSON and common data formats. All processing happens locally in the browser — no data is ever transmitted to any server.

## Available Tools

- [JSON Formatter & Validator](https://jsontools.space/): Format, validate, and minify JSON with syntax highlighting and error detection.
- [CSV to JSON Converter](https://jsontools.space/tools/csv-to-json): Convert CSV and TSV files to JSON. Auto-detect delimiters, headers, and data types.
- [JSON to CSV Converter](https://jsontools.space/tools/json-to-csv): Flatten JSON arrays to CSV. Handles nested objects and arrays.
- [XML to JSON Converter](https://jsontools.space/tools/xml-to-json): Convert XML documents to clean JSON. Handles attributes and nested elements.
- [JSON to XML Converter](https://jsontools.space/tools/json-to-xml): Convert JSON objects to valid XML with configurable root element and formatting.
- [YAML to JSON Converter](https://jsontools.space/tools/yaml-to-json): Parse YAML files and convert them to JSON instantly.
- [JSON to YAML Converter](https://jsontools.space/tools/json-to-yaml): Convert JSON to YAML with proper indentation and formatting.
- [Excel to JSON Converter](https://jsontools.space/tools/excel-to-json): Upload .xlsx or .xls files and convert spreadsheet data to JSON.
- [JSON to Excel Converter](https://jsontools.space/tools/json-to-excel): Export JSON arrays to downloadable Excel spreadsheets.
- [JSON Diff](https://jsontools.space/tools/json-diff): Compare two JSON objects side-by-side. Highlights added, removed, and changed values.
- [JSON Tree Viewer](https://jsontools.space/tools/json-tree): Visualize JSON as an interactive collapsible tree or node graph. Copy paths with one click.
- [JSON Schema Generator](https://jsontools.space/tools/json-schema): Generate JSON Schema (Draft-07 or 2020-12) from any JSON sample.
- [JSON to TypeScript / Zod](https://jsontools.space/tools/json-to-ts): Generate TypeScript interfaces or Zod schemas from JSON.
- [Base64 Encode / Decode](https://jsontools.space/tools/base64): Encode text or files to Base64, decode Base64 strings. Supports URL-safe variant.
- [URL Encode / Decode](https://jsontools.space/tools/url-encode): Encode special characters for URLs or decode percent-encoded strings.
- [JWT Decoder](https://jsontools.space/tools/jwt-decoder): Decode and inspect JWT tokens. Displays header, payload, and signature without verification.
- [Hash Generator](https://jsontools.space/tools/hash): Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, and SHA-512 hashes from any text input.
- [Regex Tester](https://jsontools.space/tools/regex-tester): Test regular expressions with live match highlighting. Supports flags and capture groups.
- [Cron Parser](https://jsontools.space/tools/cron-parser): Parse and explain cron expressions in plain English. Shows next execution times.
- [Unix Timestamp Converter](https://jsontools.space/tools/unix-timestamp): Convert between Unix timestamps and human-readable dates. Supports seconds and milliseconds.
- [UUID Generator](https://jsontools.space/tools/uuid): Generate random UUID v4 identifiers. Bulk generation up to 100, multiple format options.
- [CSS / HTML / JS Minifier](https://jsontools.space/tools/minifier): Minify CSS, HTML, or JavaScript to reduce file size. Client-side only.
- [SQL Formatter](https://jsontools.space/tools/sql-formatter): Format and beautify SQL queries. Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, T-SQL, and standard SQL.

## Key Facts

- All tools run entirely in the browser (no server processing)
- No user accounts, no data storage, no cookies (except optional dark mode preference)
- Free to use with no rate limits
- Available at: https://jsontools.space
